provisions.title: Short title and commencement
provisions.content:
1. Short title and commencement
This Act may be cited as the National Arts Council of Botswana Act, and shall come into operation on such date as the Minister may, by Order published in the Gazette , appoint.

provisions.title: Interpretation

provisions.chapter: PART II Establishment of Council and Board
provisions.title: Establishment of Council
provisions.content:
3. Establishment of Council
(1) There is hereby established a Council to be known as the National Arts Council of Botswana.
(2) The Council shall be a body corporate with a common seal, capable of suing and being sued in its corporate name, and, subject to the provisions of this Act, of performing such acts as bodies corporate may, by law, perform.

provisions.chapter: PART II Establishment of Council and Board
provisions.title: Objectives of Council

provisions.chapter: PART II Establishment of Council and Board
provisions.title: Functions of Council

the whole complex of distinctive, spiritual, material, intellectual and emotional features that characterise a society or social group and further includes not only the arts and letters, but also modes of life, the fundamental rights of the human being, value systems, traditions and beliefs
